parameters.query:
with checks as (
  select
    data_domain,
    latest_data_at,
    data_age,
    records_recent,
    case
      when data_domain = 'grid_frequency' and (latest_data_at is null or data_age > interval '30 seconds') then 'critical'
      when data_domain = 'grid_time_deviation' and (latest_data_at is null or data_age > interval '60 seconds') then 'warning'
      when data_domain = 'market_price_points' and (latest_data_at is null or records_recent = 0) then 'warning'
      else null
    end as severity
  from energy_data.v_ingestion_health
), inserted as (
  insert into energy_data.ingestion_alerts (workflow_name, severity, message, metadata)
  select
    'ingestion_health_monitor',
    severity,
    data_domain || ' appears stale or empty',
    jsonb_build_object(
      'data_domain', data_domain,
      'latest_data_at', latest_data_at,
      'data_age', data_age::text,
      'records_recent', records_recent
    )
  from checks
  where severity is not null
  returning 1
)
insert into energy_data.ingestion_runs (
  workflow_name,
  source_id,
  finished_at,
  status,
  records_read,
  records_written
)
select
  'ingestion_health_monitor',
  (select id from energy_data.data_sources where code = 'calculated'),
  now(),
  'success',
  (select count(*)::integer from checks),
  (select count(*)::integer from inserted);
